sys_script_client.description:
Use this Client Script to display the Reopen Comments form field if it has data
Add defect/story info below, newest first: 2.8.5 | 2023-08-06 | mmcc | DFCT0012102 - Subtask; Detailed Status - Reopen comments are editable and should NOT when the task is in the 'Complete" state Added g_form.setReadOnly('reopen_comments', true) 2.8.5 | 2023-07-24 | mmcc | STRY0135715 - Edit privilege for my comments in the All Responses Modal Created Client Script
sys_script_client.name: Task-onLoad-All-Comments
